title: Countdown to the mega IPO of SpaceX: A giant leap for insiders, a gigantic risk for public investors?
description: SpaceX's IPO has more riding on it than size alone: indices like Nasdaq and S&P Dow Jones seem eager to rewrite inclusion rules for mega listings. Are equity platforms tilting away from investor interest? Index providers must decide who they serve: investors who track them or issuers who game them.
